title: Third Eye of Wisdom
wikitext:
[]: Third Eye of Wisdom             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Dec 05, 2009 8:00 pm Ok, so as most of us know, in the end of Evangelion 2.0, Unit 01 goes Tengen Toppa (so to say). Both of Her eyes turn red, and some sort of eye possibley third eye appears. Definantly not her horn, it doesn't change, and in a different thread, it's told that it highly resembles the facial feature of Unit 08. Any takers on this?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Dec 05, 2009 8:07 pm Makes sense to me but it's hard to say at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by Fazmotron » Sat Dec 05, 2009 8:10 pm Good theory, but not enough information at this point to be anywhere near conclusive. Best to wait for a higher quality video before speculating further.
